title: PERK: Personal Email Research Knowledge Graph
description: PERK is a personal knowledge graph (PKG) built from synthetic academic email threads (PATRA) and grounded in the PERKOnto ontology. It ships a KG-QA benchmark (PRASHNA-PATRA, 200 question/answer pairs with Cypher), an annotated gold set of extracted triples, and a full construction and evaluation pipeline (LLM extraction, FAISS + LLM entity resolution, Neo4j graph construction, Sentence-BERT triple / KG-QA evaluation). Code is released under MIT; the datasets under CC-BY-4.0.
